extraction.one_line_summary: MILANO Juan Sebastian won a flat sprint stage after teammate OLIVEIRA Bryan delivered a perfectly-timed long-range leadout that overcame Alpecin's positioning dominance.
tactical_patterns: UAE's OLIVEIRA launched leadout from deep in final 500m with momentum trumping Alpecin's positional advantage at 1km.
JANSSENS Jimmy delivered peloton to sprint finish for third consecutive sprint stage, establishing Soudal's breakaway control pattern.
YATES BOB attacked solo mid-stage to secure most aggressive rider bonus while protecting teammate's breakaway jersey eligibility.

rider_signals.OLIVEIRA Bryan: positive: demonstrated elite-level leadout speed at 500m-out, suggesting reclassification as top-tier final pilot not just mountain domestique
rider_signals.MILANO Juan Sebastian: positive: showed patience to launch at 200m despite leadout's early positioning, indicating mature sprint timing beyond typical UAE mountain focus
rider_signals.GROVES Caden: neutral: had highest raw speed but positioning at 500m negated power advantage, suggesting leadout weakness persists
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: neutral: commentary notes increased nervousness before Stage 13 climbing suggests GC pressure mounting despite easy flat stage defense
